rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RITA T. YEARWOOD REV. LIVING TR DATE 11/1/1999 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Respondent Dayna Yearwood For Attorneys Fees Under Ccp Section 405.38
rulings.Rulings: The motion for an award of fees is granted. Nothing in the law requires that such a motion be brought concurrently with the motion to expunge. Given the absence of persuasive evidence showing a lack of testimonial capacity in 1999, the Court concludes that Petitioners did not have substantial justification for filing and defending the lis pendens. The Court has carefully reviewed the fee request and concludes that $15,658 is the reasonable amount of fees and costs that Petitioners Desiree Valverde and Heather Hawkins must pay to Respondent Dayna Yearwood. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, October 4, 2017.
